original_datasets.name: Benin2012survey
original_datasets.columns: [id, passage, ethnie, BoniVote, male, Control, Femme, FemmeFon, FonGroup, YorubaGroup, BaribaGroup]

summary_statistics.info: 1104 rows x 67 columns. Key variables: passage (5 categories; Control=156, Femme=156, FonFemme=155, plus others), ethnie (30 categories; Fon=388, Yorouba=119, Bariba=91, etc.), BoniVote (binary 0/1; 782 non-null, 322 missing). dtypes: float64(30), int64(12), object(25).
summary_statistics.describe: BoniVote: min=0.0, Q1=0.0, median=0.0, Q3=1.0, max=1.0, missing=322.

original_datasets.notes: Outcome variable BoniVote has substantial missingness (782 non-missing of 1104). Both bonivote (object) and BoniVote (float) appear; analysis uses BoniVote. Ethnicity recoding into three groups (Wife Coethnics=Fon; President Coethnics=Yorouba/Bariba; Non Ethnics=all others) is required. Analysis focuses on three treatment passages: Control, Femme, FonFemme.

tasks.task_instruction: Conduct the analysis without additional restriction.

analysis_path.path_description: Filter to Control, Femme, FonFemme passages; recode ethnicity to wife’s coethnics, president’s coethnics, and non-ethnics; fit logistic regression of voting intention on Group, ethnicity, and their interaction; compute treatment vs control contrasts within each ethnicity.
preprocessing_steps: Filter rows with passage in [Control, Femme, FonFemme].
Recode ethnie into three groups: Fon -> Wife Coethnics; Yorouba or Bariba -> President Coethnics; all others -> Non Ethnics.
Set Group as categorical with Control as reference.
Drop rows with missing values in BoniVote, Group, or ethnicity recode.

key_choices.outcome_measure: BoniVote (binary voting intention for Yayi Boni).
key_choices.main_predictor_measure: Experimental group (Group: Control, Femme, FonFemme) interacted with ethnicity group.
key_choices.sample_restriction: Include only passages: Control, Femme, FonFemme.
key_choices.missing_data_rule: Listwise deletion on variables used in the model.
key_choices.data_processing: Recode ethnicity into three categories; set Group factor with Control as reference.
key_choices.inference_rule: Two-sided p-values for contrasts; odds ratios with 95% confidence intervals.

outcome.name: BoniVote
outcome.definition: Binary indicator of intention to vote for Yayi Boni (0/1).

main_predictor.name: Group × et
main_predictor.definition: Group: Control vs Femme vs FonFemme; et: Wife Coethnics (Fon), President Coethnics (Yorouba/Bariba), Non Ethnics (others); includes their interaction.

analysis_code.notes: Python translation of the provided R script. Reads /app/data/Benin2012survey.csv, fits GLM Binomial, and outputs contrasts with ORs and 95% CIs to /app/data/task1_contrasts.csv.

tasks.notes_for_agent: Follow this planned path; do not change the focal claim, dataset, or analysis goal.

tasks.task_instruction: Restrict the analysis to Benin-related survey experiment data.

analysis_path.path_description: Using the Benin survey experiment data, repeat Task1: filter to Control, Femme, FonFemme; recode ethnicity into three groups; fit logistic regression with Group, ethnicity, and their interaction; compute contrasts vs control within each ethnicity.
preprocessing_steps: Restrict to the Benin 2012 survey experiment (provided CSV).
Filter rows with passage in [Control, Femme, FonFemme].
Recode ethnie into three groups: Fon -> Wife Coethnics; Yorouba or Bariba -> President Coethnics; all others -> Non Ethnics.
Set Group as categorical with Control as reference.
Drop rows with missing values in BoniVote, Group, or ethnicity recode.

key_choices.outcome_measure: BoniVote (binary voting intention for Yayi Boni).
key_choices.main_predictor_measure: Experimental group (Group: Control, Femme, FonFemme) interacted with ethnicity group.
key_choices.sample_restriction: Benin survey experiment data; passages Control, Femme, FonFemme.
key_choices.missing_data_rule: Listwise deletion on variables used in the model.
key_choices.data_processing: Recode ethnicity into three categories; set Group factor with Control as reference.
key_choices.inference_rule: Two-sided p-values for contrasts; odds ratios with 95% confidence intervals.

outcome.name: BoniVote
outcome.definition: Binary indicator of intention to vote for Yayi Boni (0/1).

main_predictor.name: Group × et
main_predictor.definition: Group: Control vs Femme vs FonFemme; et: Wife Coethnics (Fon), President Coethnics (Yorouba/Bariba), Non Ethnics (others); includes their interaction.

analysis_code.notes: Python translation of the stage 2 R script restricted to Benin survey experiment data. Outputs contrasts to /app/data/task2_contrasts.csv.

tasks.notes_for_agent: Use the planned logistic regression path with the Benin survey experiment subset.

files.data/replication_script__py.py: Python rewrite of Task1 R analysis. Loads Benin2012survey.csv, filters experimental conditions, recodes ethnicity, fits GLM Binomial with Group × ethnicity interaction, computes treatment vs control contrasts (ORs, 95% CIs), and writes /app/data/task1_contrasts.csv.
files.data/replication_script_stage2__py.py: Python rewrite of Task2 R analysis (restricted to Benin survey experiment data). Performs the same modeling and outputs /app/data/task2_contrasts.csv.

codebase.notes: Original R scripts were provided; per the run policy, they were translated to Python. Both scripts expect the dataset mounted at /app/data. No additional external dependencies or files are required.

analysis.instructions: Execute Task1 and Task2 using the original dataset and produce structured outputs (model summaries and contrast tables with ORs, 95% CIs, and p-values).
not_allowed_actions: replace the planned path with a different analysis path

debugging_rule.repair_scope: fix dependency, file path, or output extraction issues only; do not redesign the analysis.

analysis.comparison_metrics: Odds ratios and 95% confidence intervals for treatment vs control contrasts within each ethnicity group (especially wife’s coethnics under FonFemme), corresponding p-values, and logistic regression coefficient summaries.
